autoCheckAndCoverDebt(address,address).details: Automatically cover debt if threshold reached

params.reactiveContract: Address of the Reactive Network contract
params.token: Token to use for debt coverage

calculateFee(address,uint8,uint256,uint2.details: Calculate fee based on minutes-based valuation

returns._0: fee Fee amount in token units

coverReactiveDebt(address,address).details: Cover debt for a Reactive Network contract using accumulated fees

params.reactiveContract: Address of the Reactive Network contract
params.token: Token to use for debt coverage

distributeFee(address,uint8,uint256,uint.details: Distribute fee directly to Trust Wallet and accumulate for debt coverage

getAccumulatedFees(address).details: Get accumulated fees for a token

getContractsWithDebtCount().details: Get number of contracts with debt

getTotalDebtsCovered(address).details: Get total debts covered for a contract

getTrustWalletForToken(address).details: Get Trust Wallet address for a token

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

registerReactiveContract(address).details: Register a Reactive Network contract for debt coverage

params.reactiveContract: Address of the Reactive Network contract

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setDefaultTrustWallet(address).details: Set default Trust Wallet address for this chain

setTrustWalletAddress(address,address).details: Set Trust Wallet address for a specific token

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.reactiveContract: Address of the Reactive Network contract

params.token: Token address to withdraw (address(0) for native)
